user.title: Connect to Crystal Water Monitor
user.description: Enter your Crystal Connect API key. [Get an API key]({api_key_url})

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check your key and try again.
error.no_subscription: No active subscription. You must have an active Crystal Water Monitor subscription to use the Connect API.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Crystal API. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.
